zh.Ellam Manor, Crayford, London Borough of: 英國英格蘭倫敦可雷福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Harman of Ellam於1455年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Thomas Harman25歲，母親Elizabeth Elham21歲。他於1484年與Mary在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1501年3月31日在英國肯特可雷福德享年46歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Ellam Manor, Crayford, London Borough of: 英国英格兰倫敦可雷福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Harman of Ellam于1455年1月1日出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Thomas Harman25岁，母亲Elizabeth Elham21岁。他于1484年与Mary在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1501年3月31日在英国肯特可雷福德享年46岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Harman of Ellam was born on 1 January 1455, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Harman, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Elham, was 21. He married Mary in 1484, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 31 March 1501, in Crayford, Kent, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Harman of Ellam est né le 1 janvier 1455, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Harman, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Elham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary en 1484, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1501, à Crayford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Harman of Ellam am 1. Januar 1455 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Harman 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Elham 21. Er hat 1484 in London, England Mary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 31. März 1501 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Crayford, Kent, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Harman of Ellam è nato il il 1 gennaio 1455 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Harman, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Elham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mary nel 1484, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 31 marzo 1501, nel Crayford, Kent, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.Ellam Manor, Crayford, London Borough of: イギリスイギリスロンドンクレイフォード
ja.Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケント
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Harman of Ellamが1455年1月1日にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Thomas Harmanは25歳，母Elizabeth Elhamは21歳であった。1484年にイギリスロンドンでMaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1501年3月31日にイギリスケントクレイフォードで46歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Harman of Ellam(이)가 1455년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Harman(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Elham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 런던에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1501년 3월 31일 영국 켄트 크라이퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.1 January 1455–31 March 1501: 1455 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1501 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 31
mn.Ellam Manor, Crayford, London Borough of: Crayford, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.1 January 1455–31 March 1501: 1 de janeiro de 1455–31 de março de 1501
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Harman of Ellam nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1455, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Harman, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Elham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary em 1484, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1501, em Crayford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Harman of Ellam родился 1 января 1455 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Harman было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Elham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary в 1484 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 31 марта 1501 г. в местности креифорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.1 January 1455–31 March 1501: 1 de enero de 1455–31 de marzo de 1501
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Harman of Ellam nació el 1 de enero de 1455, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Harman, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Elham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mary en 1484, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1501, en Crayford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
